LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS EXECUTIVE TRUSTEE SERVICES, INC, WELLS FARGO BANK, NA, GMAC MORTGAGE LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE HARM AND PREJUDICE AS A RESULT OF NOTICE'S ALLEGED DEFICIENCY. NO TENDER IS ALLEGED; NO FORECLOSURE HAS TAKEN PLACE. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ACCOUNTING WHICH IS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2011 Continued To Jan-13-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re: Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER.
Appearances: Marc Bender (650.353.4503) for plaintiff and moving party; Thomas Abbott of Severson & Werson (677.5569) for defendants and responding parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Insufficient harm is demonstrated by the loss of this rental property. Plaintiffs are unlikely to prevail without offering to pay the full amount of the debt. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS EXECUTIVE TRUSTEE SERVICES, INC, WELLS FARGO BANK, NA, GMAC MORTGAGE LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Marc Bender (650.353.4503) for plaintiff and responding party; Thomas Abbott of Severson & Werson (677.5569) for defendants and moving parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to 1st, 2nd and 3rd causes of action. Plaintiffs to allege harm and prejudice as a result of notice's alleged deficiency. No tender is alleged; no foreclosure has taken place. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 4th cause of action for accounting which is not contested. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re: Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Continued To Sep-14-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re: Temporary Restraining Order IS CONTINUED TO 9/14/11 TO BE HEARD WITH DEMURRER. TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER TO REMAIN IN EFFECT. (302/REQ) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Court Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re: Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Continued To Aug-08-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER.
Appearances: Marc D. Bender of the Law Offices of David G. Finkelstein (650.353.4503) for plaintiff and moving party.
No other appearances. Mr. Bender presented the court with a copy of the proof of service and indicated that the parties had agreed to continue the matter. The court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to August 8, 2011. Any opposition to be filed by July 18, 2011 with a reply to be filed by July 25, 2011. Mr. Bender to give notice. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
